title: Final Fantasy VIII
platform_style_description: PlayStation-inspired pixel art, moody lighting, low-poly-era color language, and strong late-90s contrast translated into crisp pixels
main_subject: a single armored walking machine with a rider silhouette
environment: a snowy ridge at dusk with distant industrial lights and heavy cloud cover
action_mood_cue: advancing slowly through the snow toward the glowing city below
composition: single walking machine only, wide snow field, one distant city glow, and a strong diagonal march line
memory_hook: snowbound opening, magitek march, and the feeling of a huge story about to unfold
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro RPG game.

A single armored walking machine with a rider silhouette in a snowy ridge at dusk with distant industrial lights and heavy cloud cover, advancing slowly through the snow toward the glowing city below.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- PlayStation-inspired pixel art, moody lighting, low-poly-era color language, and strong late-90s contrast translated into crisp pixels
- always rendered as pixel art
- crisp pixel edges, readable sprite-like shading, and controlled dithering when useful
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- epic, cold, foreboding

Composition:
- single walking machine only, wide snow field, one distant city glow, and a strong diagonal march line
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- pixel art only
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid official magitek walker designs, avoid Terra likeness, avoid franchise emblems, avoid exact opening shot recreation, avoid resemblance to final fantasy

generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
